name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate bilingual senior SDE interview scripts and Excalidraw visual boards from technical excerpts.

interface.shortDescription: Bilingual senior SDE scripts plus Excalidraw boards.
interface.longDescription: Turn technical interview excerpts into concise Chinese and English senior SDE speaking scripts, then map the same content into an Excalidraw-first visual explanation.
defaultPrompt: Turn this excerpt into bilingual SDE scripts and an Excalidraw board.
Create a senior interview answer and Excalidraw visual.
Explain this system design concept with a script and diagram.
